item.title: s8seer update 2023 December 4
item.description:
Moved meel's link from site navigation to credits in links and graphics page since their site got updated and it doesn't resemble this one anymore.
Not very happy with the site's appearance and may do vivid changes at some point.
There's a new page for my clan's information but it's not pointed out very much since it is a nieche even compared to this website.

item.title: s8seer update 2023 november 8
item.description:
Goodbye halloween!
Update got delayed for reasons.
Working on new projects so the weekly update will usually done monthly from now on.
Styled the terminal a bit.
Repo panel looks nicer now.
Background update and a few other stuff.

item.title: s8seer update 2023 october 27
item.description:
Happy halloween!.
Fixed a few stuff with the rss feed.
FNAF MOVIE FNAF MOVIE FNAF MOVIE
Main page has been fnaf'd
Latest halloween update will be on oct 31 and the site will return to own theme after some time.

item.title: s8seer update 2023 october 21
item.description: RSS feed is now available. It may be a mess for now but it'll probably get better. Youtube embed has been removed since it has google cookies which are not really great.
